criteria.reason: Static aggregate geography counts route through deterministic local-SDE helpers, including current-location aliases and moon-in-constellation cases.
Executor now avoids unnecessary live-context fetches and finalizes deterministic aggregate answers before the generic model loop.
Prompt, toolset, and intent-parsing regressions are covered for Russian, English, bare-name, and current-location static count queries.
Targeted tests, typecheck, lint, build, and production deployment all succeeded on the current code.
